name: AI Free Tier Ledger
description: Hand-verified ledger of AI free tiers: what is free, exact limits, the catch, and last-verified dates.

entries.whats_free: Flagship auto model, file uploads, image generation, a small daily budget of thinking-mode messages.
entries.limits: ~10 msgs / 5 h fast window, then auto-downgrade to mini model
entries.catch: Limits are dynamic. Opting out of personalized ads can cut the cap to as low as ~5 msgs / 3 h.

entries.whats_free: Claude Sonnet (current gen) on web, iOS, Android and desktop. File uploads and artifacts included.
entries.limits: ~15-40 msgs per 5 h session window, varies with demand
entries.catch: Caps shrink at peak hours. Long conversations burn the quota much faster.

entries.whats_free: Full flagship model including the reasoning mode, on web and mobile.
entries.catch: Data is processed in China and chats are used for training by default.

entries.whats_free: Unlimited quick AI searches with citations.
entries.limits: ~5 Pro searches / day, a few Deep Research runs / day
entries.catch: No Labs or premium model picker on the free plan; Deep Research is capped to a handful of runs a day.

entries.whats_free: Gemini Flash chat, limited Pro access, image generation, 5 Deep Research uses/month, Google app integrations.
entries.limits: Compute-based caps: refresh every 5 h, plus a weekly ceiling
entries.catch: Limits scale with prompt complexity and chat length, so heavy use runs out sooner. Top models and higher caps need a Google AI plan.

entries.whats_free: GPT-class chat with web grounding, voice, and image generation (15 fast boosts/week, slow queue after).
entries.limits: Dynamic throttling at peak times; images 1024x1024 only
entries.catch: Free image output is licensed for personal, non-commercial use.

entries.whats_free: Top Mistral models, web search, image generation, code interpreter, 40+ connectors.
entries.catch: No Mistral Large, Flash Answers or no-telemetry mode on the free plan.

entries.whats_free: Grok text chat on grok.com and X for logged-in users.
entries.catch: Needs an X account 7+ days old with a verified phone number. Image generation is paid-only.

entries.whats_free: Real ongoing free tier on Gemini Flash models via AI Studio, including multimodal.
entries.limits: Flash only, e.g. Gemini 3 Flash ~1,500 req/day; exact per-project quotas shown in AI Studio
entries.catch: Pro models were pulled from the free tier in April 2026. Enabling billing on the project kills the free tier instantly. Free-tier data may be used for training.

entries.whats_free: OpenAI-compatible API. Llama 3.3 70B and others at ~300 tokens/sec.
entries.catch: Free limits were cut hard in 2026 (daily requests dropped from 14,400 to 1,000 on most models).

entries.whats_free: Fastest inference around (~2,000 tokens/sec) on a rotating lineup of open-weight models (Llama, Qwen, GPT-OSS).
entries.catch: Small model lineup that rotates often: a model you rely on can disappear from the free tier.

entries.whats_free: Experiment tier: roughly 1B tokens/month across Mistral models. One of the most generous quotas anywhere.
entries.catch: You must opt in to letting Mistral train on your data to get the free tier.

entries.whats_free: Dozens of ":free" models from many labs behind one OpenAI-compatible key.
entries.catch: A one-time $10 credit purchase lifts the cap to 1,000 req/day. Free models may log or train on prompts and can vanish without notice.

entries.whats_free: Playground and API access to GPT, Llama and more with any GitHub account.
entries.limits: High-tier models 50 req/day (10/min), mini models 150 req/day; 8K tokens in / 4K out per request
entries.catch: Prototyping only: per-request token caps are tight and concurrency is 2.

entries.whats_free: Trial key for Command models, embeddings and rerank. Never expires, no card needed.
entries.catch: Evaluation only; commercial use requires a paid production key.

entries.whats_free: Small monthly inference credit usable across hosted open models.
entries.catch: The free credit is symbolic. Real usage needs PRO ($9/mo, $2 in credits) or your own hardware.

entries.whats_free: OpenAI: a daily free-token allowance if you opt in to sharing your API data (up to ~1M tokens/day on frontier models, ~10M/day on mini). Anthropic: a one-time $5 trial credit.
entries.limits: OpenAI: daily, opt-in only; Anthropic: one-time
entries.catch: OpenAI's free tokens cost you your data. Anthropic's $5 needs SMS verification and is a trial, not a tier. The old OpenAI $5 welcome credit is gone.

entries.whats_free: Completions plus chat and agent mode in VS Code, JetBrains, Neovim and the CLI.
entries.catch: Auto model selection only. Agent mode eats the 50-request budget very fast.

entries.whats_free: Terminal coding agent on Gemini models with a personal Google account. Successor to Gemini CLI, which Google shut down for consumer accounts on June 18, 2026.
entries.limits: ~20 agent requests/day, refreshing ~5 h with a weekly ceiling (community-reported)
entries.catch: Google doesn't publish exact numbers and has cut the quota repeatedly (250/day at launch, ~20 now). The CLI shares its credit pool with the Antigravity IDE.

entries.whats_free: Full editor with unlimited Tab autocomplete.
entries.catch: Pricing was overhauled in March 2026 (credits replaced by daily/weekly quotas); premium models stay gated to paid plans.

entries.whats_free: Limited agent requests and tab completions to try the editor.
entries.limits: Small monthly cap, exact numbers unpublished
entries.catch: Cursor doesn't publish concrete Hobby-plan numbers. It's a demo, not a daily driver; power features need Pro.

entries.whats_free: The tools themselves, forever. Open source coding agents for VS Code and terminal.
entries.catch: You supply the model. Pair with the free APIs above (Gemini, Groq, Cerebras) for a genuine $0 coding stack.

entries.whats_free: GPT-image generation, 4 variations per prompt. Unlimited slow-queue after boosts run out.
entries.catch: 1024x1024 only, no other sizes. Output licensed personal, non-commercial by default.

entries.whats_free: Weekly credits, no watermark, best-in-class text rendering inside images. Commercial use explicitly allowed.
entries.catch: Free generations are public in the community gallery, and the weekly allowance is a fraction of the old 10/day.

entries.whats_free: Daily token allowance across models, roughly 15 to 35 standard images per day.
entries.catch: Free generations are public by default.

entries.whats_free: Imagen image generation and limited Veo video with a Google account.
entries.limits: 50 credits/day, no rollover; free credits cover Veo 3.1 Lite/Fast/Quality only
entries.catch: ImageFX and Whisk were shut down in April 2026 and folded into Flow. Output is watermarked (SynthID).

entries.whats_free: Unlimited private generation on your own machine. Commercial use OK for most model licenses.
entries.limits: None. Your hardware is the limit
entries.catch: Needs a GPU (8GB+ VRAM for comfort) and some setup patience. Licenses differ per model: FLUX.1 schnell is Apache-2.0, FLUX.1 dev is non-commercial.

entries.whats_free: Top-tier text-to-speech, about 10 minutes of audio per month.
entries.catch: No commercial use on free; attribution required in anything public.

entries.whats_free: Full-song music generation, about 10 songs per day on the current model.
entries.catch: No commercial use and no downloads: free songs are listen-only inside Suno since the late-2025 Warner deal. Shared (slower) queue.

entries.whats_free: Unlimited speech-to-text transcription on your own machine, 90+ languages.
entries.limits: None. Your hardware is the limit
entries.catch: Large models want a decent GPU; small ones run fine on CPU.

entries.whats_free: Daily credit allowance for short clips.
entries.catch: Slow queue on free; watermark on output.

entries.whats_free: Small monthly credit pool in the Dream Machine web and iOS apps.
entries.limits: Monthly credits: web amount unpublished, iOS app lists 250/mo. 720p drafts, no audio
entries.catch: Permanent watermark, non-commercial only, and Luma doesn't publish the web free credit amount.

entries.whats_free: One-time credit grant to try Gen models.
entries.catch: Not a recurring free tier: once spent, it's gone. Watermarked.
